'''Ibleam''' was the primary [[Star/Legends|star]] of the [[Endor system/Legends|Endor system]], located in the [[Moddell sector/Legends|Moddell sector]] of the [[Inner Zuma Region]] on the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]] of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]]. It was orbited by four [[Planet/Legends|planets]], none of which were habitable. However, the [[Endor/Legends|forest moon]] of [[Endor (planet)/Legends|Endor]] possessed a [[Atmosphere/Legends#Type I atmospheres|breathable atmosphere]] and was teeming with life, most notably the [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] [[Species/Legends|species]] known as [[Ewok/Legends|Ewoks]], who played a vital role in the defeat of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].
